series_metadata.series_description: Department prepares approvals (for Administrator) of requests from claimants who are receiving UC benefits, but who wish to attend school full-time and will not be looking for work. The training, which must be vocational in nature, must lead to a job when completed. File includes background research materials and school course outlines. Information is put on the computer network so it can be viewed by local office staff.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain 3 years, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
